0f7c6ed276fc.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
0f7c6ed276fc.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
0f7c6ed276fc.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

24f822c5811c.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
24f822c5811c.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
24f822c5811c.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

640a769c7b3d.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
640a769c7b3d.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

6853592c959d.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
6853592c959d.description: At 110 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
